items.name: Feature Callout
items.description: A centered framed shot placeholder with a mono eyebrow label on top and a big display caption with one accent payoff below.
items.snippet:
Your UI here
Feature · what it does
One panel, one payoff
items.motion: a slow crop punch-in on the shot, then the caption rises and lands a beat after the frame settles; firm eases, no bounce

items.name: Outro Scene
items.description: An end card — a generic wordmark, a two-line CTA with one accent tagline, and a follow ask. Generic brand, no logo or brand character.
items.snippet:
Studio Kit
Build in the open.
npm create example-app
New drops weekly. Follow along.
items.motion: elements rise and settle top to bottom, staggered, on firm eases; no bounce, no overshoot

items.name: Code Reveal
items.description: A mono code block that reveals line by line with one highlighted payoff line. Generic sample code, no personal refs.
items.snippet: async function load(id) { if (!res.ok) throw new Error("not found"); }
items.motion: lines reveal top to bottom staggered, sliding in from the read direction; the highlighted line settles last and holds; no bounce

items.name: Title Card
items.description: Kinetic-type opener — a mono eyebrow, a big display headline with one accent word, and a calm subtitle. No UI.
items.snippet:
Example.com · 2026

Ship faster, break less

A calm, one-idea-per-frame opener.
items.motion: eyebrow and headline rise and settle on firm eases, then the subtitle lands a beat later; power2/power3 out, no bounce

items.name: Quote Scene
items.description: A large pull-quote with attribution; the oversized quotation mark is the single accent payoff. Generic quote.
items.snippet:
“
Make the important thing the obvious thing.
Casey Vale · Design lead
items.motion: the mark pops in first, then the quote rises and settles, then the attribution lands a beat later; firm eases, no overshoot
